positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical, flying crescent moon guiding a stylized, glowing constellation. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, featuring deep midnight blue and vibrant starlight yellow/gold accents against a rich, matte black background. Utilize clean, thick linework and negative space to create strong silhouettes. Incorporate abstract cosmic elements like nebula swirls and gentle stardust trails. The style should be sophisticated vector art with a limited color palette, optimized for screen printing on dark apparel. High contrast, celestial, serene, cosmic dreamscape.
negative: low resolution, blurry, out of focus, grainy, artifacts, noisy, text, watermark, signature, cartoon, photorealistic, 3d render, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, messy, poor composition, logos
